name: Impacket PsExec Execution
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: Impacket PsExec Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of Impacket's psexec.py.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remcom_stdin%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remcom_stdout%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remcom_stderr%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Impacket PsExec Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remcom_stdin%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remcom_stdout%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remcom_stderr%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Bhabesh Raj SIGMA Title: Impacket PsExec Execution SIGMA Description: Detects execution of Impacket's psexec.py.  False positives: - Unknown  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
